toolCall.name: run_command
toolCall.argumentsJson: {"CommandLine":"$uvCache = \"$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\uv\\cache\"; if (Test-Path $uvCache) { $size = (Get-ChildItem $uvCache -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum).Sum; Write-Host \"UV cache before: $([math]::Round($size/1GB,2)) GB\"; Remove-Item $uvCache -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host \"UV cache cleared\" } else { Write-Host \"No UV cache found\" }","Cwd":"C:\\Users\\joel0","WaitMsBeforeAsync":10000,"toolAction":"Clearing UV cache","toolSummary":"UV cache cleanup"}
